title: Japanese 2x2 Digital Ad Banner Board AI
sourceTitle: Japanese 2x2 Digital Ad Banner Board AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Japanese-style 2x2 digital advertisement banner board featuring four fictional lifestyle campaign quadrants: travel, learning, wellness, and work tools. Subject: four fictional lifestyle campaign quadrants: travel, learning, wellness, and work tools defines the four lifestyle or product-service campaign quadrants, each with a clear miniature ad subject, matching icon logic, and short campaign copy. Scene: 2x2 equal grid with beach, cafe desk, morning run and clean product flat-lay scenes organizes the four equal quadrants with distinct scenes, clean photo or product visuals, readable labels, small icon rows, and a balanced Japanese digital ad layout. Composition: Fixed 2x2 grid structure with four equal quadrants, strong separation between panels, compact Japanese digital advertisement density, headline-plus-offer hierarchy, small icon rows, and clean campaign-card readability. Signature Elements: Four equal ad banners, lifestyle quadrants, compact Japanese promotional text, icon rows, offer labels, bright commercial scenes, clean grid dividers, and social-ready digital campaign board polish. Style: Japanese-style digital advertisement banner board with polished lifestyle/product ad design, bright commercial photography, crisp UI-like text blocks, clean graphic dividers, compact offer labels, and cheerful modern campaign finish. Color Palette: Bright varied ad palette balanced across four quadrants: vivid travel blues, soft skincare pinks or wellness greens, warm productivity neutrals, clean product whites, and controlled accent colors that keep the board unified. Lighting: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure. Camera: Mixed campaign camera system inside a fixed board: lifestyle wide scene, product close-up, desk or flat-lay crop, and wellness/action vignette, all kept readable at small size. Typography: This Year, Break Free / Start Here / Build More / Stay Light appears as short readable banner headlines and CTA-style labels inside the quadrants; keep copy compact, aligned, and free of random filler. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。

imagePrompts.title: Japanese 2x2 Digital Ad Banner Board Variant 01

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Japanese-style 2x2 digital advertisement banner board featuring 2x2 grid of fictional Japanese-style digital ad banners for a quiet morning skincare campaign. Subject: 2x2 grid of fictional Japanese-style digital ad banners for a quiet morning skincare campaign defines the four lifestyle or product-service campaign quadrants, each with a clear miniature ad subject, matching icon logic, and short campaign copy. Scene: four equal quadrants with cream packaging, misty bathroom light, product close-up, lifestyle hand scene and minimal headline rhythm organizes the four equal quadrants with distinct scenes, clean photo or product visuals, readable labels, small icon rows, and a balanced Japanese digital ad layout. Composition: Fixed 2x2 grid structure with four equal quadrants, strong separation between panels, compact Japanese digital advertisement density, headline-plus-offer hierarchy, small icon rows, and clean campaign-card readability. Signature Elements: Four equal ad banners, lifestyle quadrants, compact Japanese promotional text, icon rows, offer labels, bright commercial scenes, clean grid dividers, and social-ready digital campaign board polish. Style: Japanese-style digital advertisement banner board with polished lifestyle/product ad design, bright commercial photography, crisp UI-like text blocks, clean graphic dividers, compact offer labels, and cheerful modern campaign finish. Color Palette: Bright varied ad palette balanced across four quadrants: vivid travel blues, soft skincare pinks or wellness greens, warm productivity neutrals, clean product whites, and controlled accent colors that keep the board unified. Lighting: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure. Camera: Mixed campaign camera system inside a fixed board: lifestyle wide scene, product close-up, desk or flat-lay crop, and wellness/action vignette, all kept readable at small size. Typography: ASA / MORNING SKIN / SOFT RESET / DAILY CARE appears as short readable banner headlines and CTA-style labels inside the quadrants; keep copy compact, aligned, and free of random filler. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.
